articles.title: R Ashwin on Virat Kohli’s remarks: ‘Not easy to leave regrets behind’
articles.description: R Ashwin said Virat Kohli had already achieved more than enough in international cricket and should not have to repeatedly justify his place or value after nearly two decades at the top.

articles.title: Chelsea vs Manchester City Final Highlights | Semenyo’s Wonder Goal Gives City Another Trophy
articles.description: Manchester City defeated Chelsea 1-0 at Wembley Stadium to lift the FA Cup 2026 title in a tense final packed with drama and big moments. Antoine Semenyo became the hero with a sensational backheel winner in the second half as Pep Guardiola’s side completed a domestic cup double and added another major trophy to their incredible era. 0:00 – Kickoff & First Half Highlights 1:36 – Semenyo’s Stunning Backheel Goal 3:00 – Chelsea’s Late Attack & Full-Time Celebration

articles.title: KKR ends GT's streak; Green says team has 'fighting chance' for playoffs
articles.description: Kolkata Knight Riders beat Gujarat Titans by 29 runs, ending their 5-match winning streak. Finn Allen (93), Angkrish Raghuvanshi (82*), and Cameron Green (52*) helped KKR post 247/2. GT finished at 218/4 despite fifties from Gill and Buttler.

articles.title: Vathsal Govind on idolising Sachin, meeting 'elder brother' Sanju Samson
articles.description: Kerala batter Vathsal Govind discusses idolising Sachin Tendulkar and his bond with Sanju Samson. He reflects on his cricketing journey from Delhi to Kerala, his club cricket experience in the UK, and his Ranji Trophy squad participation.

articles.title: IPL: Raghuvanshi's heroics help KKR thrash GT; McClenaghan wants more
articles.description: KKR defeated GT by 29 runs after fifties from Finn Allen, Cameron Green, and Angkrish Raghuvanshi powered them to 247/2. Raghuvanshi's unbeaten 82 drew praise, but expert Mitchell McClenaghan said the young batter needs 'another gear'.

articles.title: Thailand Open 2026: Satwik-Chirag settle for silver after hard-fought final loss to Indonesian pair
articles.description: Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty finished runners-up at the Thailand Open 2026 after losing to Indonesia’s Leo Rolly Carnando and Daniel Marthin in the men’s doubles final. The Indian pair fought back strongly in the second game and saved five championship points before going down 21-12, 25-23 in Bangkok.

articles.title: Shubman Gill joins David Warner, Sachin Tendulkar, Virat Kohli in elite list of IPL captains after fiery knock against KKR
articles.description: Shubman Gill etched his name in IPL history, joining batting greats with his second 500-run season as captain. His explosive 85 against KKR propelled him past the milestone. Despite Gill's valiant effort and a strong partnership, Gujarat Titans fell short against Kolkata Knight Riders' formidable total. KKR secured a victory, while GT remains second in the standings.

articles.title: Rousey submits Carano by armbar in 17 seconds

articles.description: Kolkata Knight Riders boosted their IPL playoff aspirations with a 29-run win over Gujarat Titans, thanks to stellar batting from Finn Allen and Angkrish Raghuvanshi. This victory, however, puts pressure on teams like Chennai Super Kings, whose playoff fate now hinges on other crucial match outcomes, including the PBKS vs RCB encounter.

articles.title: 'Dropped catches made difference': Parthiv Patel pinpoints GT’s biggest mistake vs KKR
articles.description: Gujarat Titans assistant coach Parthiv Patel highlighted dropped catches as the key factor in their 29-run loss to Kolkata Knight Riders. Missed opportunities, particularly on Finn Allen's dropped chances, proved costly as KKR posted a massive 247/2. Despite a strong partnership between Gill and Buttler, GT couldn't chase down the target.

articles.title: The $13.2M Cowboys first-round pick nobody talks about anymore - and why he urgently needs a reset
articles.description: Mazi Smith’s NFL career has reached a critical point after a disappointing stint with the Dallas Cowboys led to his inclusion in the Quinnen Williams trade. Analysts believe Smith still possesses elite physical traits, but technical flaws and inconsistent play have limited his impact. The New York Jets declined his fifth-year option, signaling uncertainty about his future. With pressure mounting and expectations lowered, Smith now enters 2026 facing perhaps his final opportunity to prove he can become a dependable NFL defensive tackle.

articles.description: Venezuela Fury, the 16-year-old daughter of Tyson Fury and Paris Fury, married 19-year-old Noah Price in a lavish Isle of Man wedding. The couple shared a kiss outside the church after saying “I do.” Tyson Fury became emotional while walking his daughter down the aisle. Netflix crews filmed the ceremony, while friends, family, and celebrity guests joined the celebration.

articles.description: Indian golfer Avani Prashanth was the only Indian to make the cut at the Amundi German Masters, firing a 4-under 69 in the second round. She finished the day at T-47. Pranavi Urs missed the cut, while Vani Kapoor withdrew.
